name: 闪烁
description: 选择5×5格范围内一个空地格，传送至该位置
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var pos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 2, filter: 'all' }); if (!pos || pos.needsTargetSelection) return pos; var dx = Math.abs(pos.x - caster.x); var dy = Math.abs(pos.y - caster.y); if (Math.max(dx, dy) > 2) return { success: false, message: '目标超出闪烁范围（5×5格内）' }; var tile = battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === pos.x && t.y === pos.y; }); if (!tile || !tile.props.walkable) return { success: false, message: '目标位置不可行走' }; var pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.x === pos.x && p.y === pos.y && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (pieceAtPos) return { success: false, message: '目标位置已被占用' }; caster.x = pos.x; caster.y = pos.y; return { success: true, message: caster.name + '闪烁至(' + pos.x + ',' + pos.y + ')' }; }
